mapper.insert: insert ignore into p_user (pwd, nick_name, phone, sex, hobby, country, prov, city, addr, avatar, introduction, create_time) values (#{pwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{hobby,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prov,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{introduction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.select: select id, pwd, nick_name, phone, sex, hobby, country, prov, city, addr, avatar, introduction, create_time from p_user where phone = #{phone}
mapper.update:
update p_user
nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pwd = #{pwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=TINYINT},
hobby = #{hobby,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
country = #{country,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prov = #{prov,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr = #{addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addr = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
introduction = #{introduction,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
